instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Practising English
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I want to improve my English speaking before the exam. [1]Would you like to practise with me?[/1]||[2]Can we practise every day this week?[/2]||[3]Where should we meet?[/3] It needs to be somewhere quiet.||[4]What topics should we talk about?[/4]||Thanks||Poppy

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Poppy,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I’d like to practise with you because I need to improve my speaking too.[/1]||[2]I can’t practise every day this week, but I’m free on Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday afternoon.[/2]||[3]We should meet in the library study room because it is quiet and we can use our notes there.[/3]||[4]We could talk about hobbies, holidays, school and future plans, because those topics often come up in exams.[/4]||I think this will really help us both.||Good luck with your revision,||Holly
